dict.string: FitnessAI uses your camera to detect body pose and analyse your workout form in real time.
FitnessAI uses Face ID to securely sign you in to your account.
FitnessAI reads your health data to personalise your workout plan and track progress.
FitnessAI saves completed workouts and calories to Apple Health.
FitnessAI uses motion data to improve workout tracking accuracy.
